recall_misses.item: Post-dissociation re-plating timeline (analyzed 7–10 days after dissociation)
recall_misses.source_says: Dissociated MT cells were re-plated in LI-BPEL+VEGF+bFGF, refreshed next day, and analyzed 7–10 days later; not captured in timeline.

notes: Non-multimodal: bundle has 0 tables and no figure image files on disk (figure captions text-only; 7 captions captured). The detailed differentiation/culture protocol (base media composition, supplement doses, growth factors, timeline) is explicitly deferred to the external supplementary ZIP (cvac059_supplementary_data.zip), which was NOT fetched into the bundle (extraction_warnings: 'external_supplement_files NOT fetched'). Adjudication is therefore limited to in-bundle text. CORRECT: cell_type=iPSC, line W156X/R225W, species=human, organoid_type=other (paper calls them 3D cardiac microtissues, not organoids — defensible), matrix=Matrigel (coating for dissociated cells), base_media=LI-BPEL, bFGF=5 ng/mL, assay_endpoints electrophysiology+RNA-seq. KEY ERRORS: (1) VEGF dose wrong — extractor assigned 5 ng/mL (the bFGF value) to VEGF; source says 50 ng/mL VEGF. (2) Three media_supplements (B27, N2, FBS) are fabricated — none appears anywhere in the captured source; 'N2' only exists as a substring of the gene 'ACTN2'. RECALL: extraction missed the 70:15:15 CM:EC:CF microtissue composition, the 21-day MT timeline, the 7–10 day re-plating window, both dissociation reagents (TrypLE Select 0.5× for monolayers, collagenase II for MTs), and Sendai-virus reprogramming origin — all of which are quotable from methods_text. timeline, small_molecules, passaging, modifications were all left empty despite quotable content.
